query: SELECT e.id, e.actionId, e.colaboradorId, e.status, e.createdAt, SUBSTRING(e.descricao, 1, 80) AS descricao, a.titulo AS acao_titulo, a.pdiId, u.name AS colaborador_nome, u.email AS colaborador_email FROM evidences e LEFT JOIN actions a ON e.actionId = a.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.colaboradorId = u.id WHERE e.status = 'aguardando_avaliacao';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT e.id, e.actionId, e.colaboradorId, e.status, e.createdAt, SUBSTRING(e.descricao, 1, 80) AS descricao, a.titulo AS acao_titulo, a.pdiId, u.name AS colaborador_nome, u.email AS colaborador_email FROM evidences e LEFT JOIN actions a ON e.actionId = a.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.colaboradorId = u.id WHERE e.status = 'aguardando_avaliacao';
